posts.author: SarahM_BookClub
posts.text: Honestly tired of the constant updates to the app's algorithm. It keeps pushing my posts down even though I've been active all morning. Feels like a waste of time for regular users who just want to catch up with friends.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless user complaint about platform functionality that does not violate policy; it expresses frustration without threatening harm or spreading misinformation.
